expectations.text: Middleware checks login status only — no role/profile lookup logic
No onboarding or role-selection page is created (0-role case kept simple)
Post-creation Server Action re-validates auth server-side (defense in depth beyond middleware)
expectations.evidence: files re-checking auth in post action: ['lib/actions/posts.ts']

expectations.text: RLS is enabled on the posts table
Logout happens server-side via supabase.auth.signOut(), not client-only
